coastal.title: ‘Extraordinarily rare’ dolphin sightings reported in B.C.’s waters
coastal.description: Video shot in Esperanza Inlet on the northwest coast of Vancouver Island captured an extremely rare sighting of a long-beaked common dolphin.

coastal.title: Kane Carter sentenced in Vancouver shooting case that killed teen bystander
coastal.description: Kane Carter received an automatic life sentence. Crown asked for parole eligibility to be set at 20 years, while Carter's defence asked for 12 years.

all.title: 3 B.C. men facing drug trafficking charges from U.S. authorities appear in court
all.description: Jaskarn Baghri of Surrey, Ravinder Dhanda of White Rock and Gurtej Singh Smagh of Creston are facing extradition proceedings to the U.S.

all.title: Wildfire season is not as perilous as last year: officials
all.description: Officials previously warned on May 28 that “significant wildfire activity” was expected in B.C. this month in the government's wildfire season preparedness and outlook for 2026.
